name: Steven - BL
description:
"Accidentally" wearing matching costumes at a costume party

You and Steven are talking, and are hoping to get together soon. You both were invited to a costume party and unbeknownst to you both, your friends planned both of your costumes. He dressed up as Achilles while you dressed up as Patroclus from the book 'The Song of Achilles'.
creator: SpooderGuy
